title: The Fortune Cafe
overview: Hotori's and Toshiko's job at a maid café conflicts with school rules. They must convince their teacher to permit their job, but first the café has a lot of improvement to do…

title: The Sexual Harassment Lawsuit
overview: An encounter with the local police officer leads Hotori to threaten sexual harassment suits. Hotori's plans to increase customers backfires.

title: The Cat Boy
overview: Moriaki begs Hotori to use her detective skills to discern the mystery surrounding two keepsake paintings. Hotori assists with recovering a pet cat.

title: The Cursed Equation
overview: After scoring a 0 on her math test, Hotori’s math teacher, Moriaki, sentences her to detention and divulges his murderous presumptions.

title: The Amazingly Strange Toshiko Tatsuno
overview: Tatsuno receives tickets to see a movie and wants to invite her love interest, Sanada. Takeru, Hotori’s younger brother, is asked to hang out by his classmate, Ebi-chan.

title: The Pandora Maid Service
overview: Hotori visits an antique shop in search of a birthday gift for Tatsuno. Later, she searches for a PC to scan an image for her site and finds a spreading pandemic.

title: The Lovers’ Midnight Dash
overview: Sanada devises a plan and uses his daily horoscope reading to win Hotori’s heart. The two decide to play hooky for the remaining school day.

title: The Fully Automated Orchestra
overview: The girls discover a vending machine with astonishingly good food. Hotori's class isn't planning anything for the Cultural Festival; Futaba suggests forming a band.

title: The Clash of the Buytans
overview: Harue challenges Toshiko to a table tennis game. Both girls put up a furious fight, but in the end, who will be the victor of the tennis table?

title: The Finger Pointing Geriatric
overview: The news reports mysterious holes that have appeared in the neighborhood. Futaba questions Hotori about the holes.

title: Kon’s Summer of Tears
overview: Mr. Moriaki tries to help Hotori with her remedial math class by comparing it to detective work with mixed results.

title: Sore Machi...
overview: Futaba & Toshiko aren't on speaking terms because Toshiko refuses to join the table tennis club. Hotori ruins an expensive pen and dreams about being judged in the afterlife.
